fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Service Contract No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service contract, if this entry is linked to a service contract.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document type of the service ledger entry.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the document from which this entry was created.

fields.name: Serv. Contract Acc. Gr. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service contract account group code the service contract is associated with, if this entry is included in a service contract.

fields.name: Moved from Prepaid Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this entry is not a prepaid entry from a service contract.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when this entry was posted.

fields.name: Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of the entry in LCY.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer related to this entry.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Item No. (Serviced)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the serviced item associated with this entry.

fields.name: Serial No. (Serviced)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the serial number of the serviced item associated with this entry.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Contract Invoice Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the invoice period of that contract, if this entry originates from a service contract.

fields.name: Global Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Global Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the global dimension that is linked to the record or entry for analysis purposes. Two global dimensions, typically for the company's most important activities, are available on all cards, documents, reports, and lists.

fields.name: Service Item No. (Serviced)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the serviced item associated with this entry.

fields.name: Contract Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contract group code of the service contract to which this entry is associated.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of origin of this entry.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Cost Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost on the line by multiplying the unit cost by the quantity.

fields.name: Discount Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total discount amount on this entry.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units in this entry.

fields.name: Charged Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units in this entry that should be invoiced.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the item or resource. You can enter a price manually or have it entered according to the Price/Profit Calculation field on the related card.

fields.name: Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the discount percentage of this entry.

fields.name: Contract Disc. Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total contract discount amount of this entry.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Fault Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the fault reason code for this entry.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the resource, item, cost, standard text, general ledger account, or service contract associated with this entry.

fields.name: Service Order Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the service order if this entry was created for a service order.

fields.name: Service Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service order, if this entry was created for a service order.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the vendor's or customer's trade type to link transactions made for this business partner with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item's product type to link transactions made for this item with the appropriate general ledger account according to the general posting setup.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location associated with this entry.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type for this entry.

fields.name: Open
fields.tooltip: Specifies contract-related service ledger entries.

fields.name: Prepaid
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the service contract or contract-related service order was prepaid.

fields.name: Applies-to Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry to which this entry is applied, if an entry is created for a service credit memo.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount on this entry.

fields.name: Job Task No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project task.

fields.name: Job Line Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the journal line type that is created in the Project Planning Line table and linked to this project ledger entry.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's numbering system.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 3 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 3, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 4 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 4, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 5 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 5, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 6 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 6, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 7 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 7, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 8 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 8, which is one of dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.
